description: Create a two-column content slide on total luxury spend by mainland Chinese with a stacked bar chart on the left and key highlights plus a quote on the right.

header.headline: Total luxury spend by mainland Chinese reached RMB212B in 2010; ~60% spent outside mainland

items.text: Overseas (including HK/Macau) spending showed strong growth; HK & Macau account for >50% of overseas spend
items.sub: Trend expected to continue in 2011/12; driven by RMB appreciation and increased overseas travels

items.text: Purchase in Mainland continued to increase, however still <50%
"The price gap between domestic & overseas remains; and with RMB appreciation, consumers are travelling abroad more and buying a lot overseas."
CAGR (09-10): Total 36%; Overseas 38%; HK & Macau 45%; Mainland 27%

footer.source: Bain Survey of Luxury Goods Consumers in Mainland China 2011 (n=1,959)
